updates_changelog_empty: This release does not include changelog notes.

pin_add_tooltip: Pin to top of this category
dlg_char_stats: This tool allows you to modify your character's attributes, such as health, speed, block power, jumping ability, and more.
dlg_char_id: This tool allows you to edit and add internal character IDs. However, the modding community currently doesn't know how to add new slots for new characters.
dlg_costume: This tool will allow you to add and edit new slots for character costumes.
dlg_sound: This tool allows you to view, extract, replace, and manage audio entries inside AWB/ACB
dlg_skill: Universal skill parameters shared across all characters. Load references, motion entries, and skill slot data.
dlg_hit_react: Edit how characters react to different hits.
dlg_dmg_effect: Edit which damage effects trigger and when they are applied.
dlg_battle_adj: Edit battle-wide damage multipliers and other balance adjustment values.
dlg_projectile: Edit projectile data used by attacks.
dlg_effect: Edit file paths and texture references used by battle effects.
dlg_char_skill: Edit per-character skills, attack behavior, projectiles, and related move parameters.
dlg_char_effect: Character-specific visual effects tied to moves and abilities. Placeholder.
dlg_char_const: Edit character-specific constraints and multipliers for gauges, damage, and related battle values.
dlg_movelist: Edit move-list entries, inputs, command names, and related move display data.
dlg_story: Edit Story Mode battle panels and the fights launched from those panels.
dlg_dialogue: Create and edit special pre-battle dialogue interactions.
dlg_assist: Edit assist calls, combo-break assists, and other support-character behavior.
dlg_game_text: Edit all in-game text: menus, tutorials, notifications, UI strings, and more.
dlg_stage_info: Edit stage information used by arena files.
dlg_ui_coll: Edit collision areas for UI elements. This changes what can be clicked, not the visible UI itself.
dlg_gimmick: Edit stage motion parameters and other arena-related motion data.
dlg_texture: View and replace texture assets packed in game files.
dlg_xfbin_audio: View, play back, export, and replace audio tones stored inside XFBIN NUS3BANK containers. Supports IS14/BNSF format used by ASBR battle sound banks.
dlg_char_viewer: EDIT THE GALLERY CHARACTER MODEL VIEWER PARAMETERS.
dlg_dictionary: EDIT GALLERY DICTIONARY CRAP AND OTHER BULLSHIT.
dlg_custom_card: Edit lobby player card character/display data.
dlg_custom_default: Controls position and scale of character models in character viewer? WHO EVEN NEEDS THAT? PLAYER CAN DO IT IN GAME
dlg_dlc_info: Edit DLC information for DLC characters, costumes, and related content.
dlg_player_title: Edit lobby player titles and related player-card title data.
dlg_sound_param: Edit when and how game audio is played.
lang_hint: Want to add a new language? Create a JSON file in the "locales" folder (e.g. fr.json) and restart the app — it will appear here automatically.
lang_share: Share your translation files with the community to help improve everyone's experience!

unsaved_changes_save_cancelled_or_failed: The file is still marked as unsaved. Finish saving or discard the changes before closing.

css_analysis_note:
Why new characters may not appear in-game:

1. This file defines exactly {face_count} FaceIcon collision boxes for the character select screen. The game only renders character icons where collision boxes exist.

2. Adding a character in characode.bin gives them an ID/slot, but without a corresponding FaceIcon collision here, there is no clickable area on the CSS.

3. The game .exe likely has a hardcoded max roster size that matches the collision count. Even if you add a FaceIcon here, the .exe may ignore entries beyond its internal limit.

4. To add a new character slot:
   a) Add a FaceIcon collision with correct position
   b) Update the _array num= count for this set
   c) The .exe roster limit may also need patching

sound_pycricodecsex_missing:
PyCriCodecsEx is not installed.
Install it with: pip install PyCriCodecsEx soundfile
sound_soundfile_missing:
soundfile is not installed, so non-WAV audio cannot be decoded.
Install it with: pip install soundfile
